---
name: Story
about: A self-contained, shippable unit of work (1:1 with a docs/stories/ file)
title: "[story] "
labels: ["type:story", "status:todo", "role:dev"]
---

> Story doc: `docs/stories/<this-issue#>-<slug>.md` (local). This issue is the durable
> record — keep the goal + acceptance criteria below in sync with the doc.

## Goal
One paragraph: the outcome and why.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] AC1 — testable
- [ ] AC2 — testable

## Context
Links to PRD / ADR / design (in local `docs/`) + key constraints
(TanStack Start, Cloudflare Workers, pnpm, Biome, Vitest).

## Out of scope
-
